name: Frontmatter Editor
description: Bulk-edit YAML frontmatter across the vault. Filter notes by property conditions, then set, delete, rename, copy or merge properties. Every action is snapshotted and undoable. Exposes a typed programmatic API (`app.plugins.plugins['frontmatter-editor'].api`) and 8 commands (set-property, delete-properties, rename-property, copy-property, merge-properties, undo-last, open-snapshots, list-properties) so agents and scripts can use it without the UI.
author: Sebastian Hanke
